subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Your letter was received, and that which was written reflected the truth. The friends of God must [display] justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما واصل و آنچه مرقوم حقیقت واقع یاران الهی باید عدالت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
